concerns.text: The 'OpenNeuro tDCS Motor Task' dataset is cited as a potential source for tDCS motor performance scores, but the URL provided (https://huggingface.co/datasets/clane9/openneuro-fslr64k/...) points to an fMRI dataset (fslr64k implies fMRI surface space), not EEG or tDCS behavioral scores. The plan assumes this dataset contains paired EEG/tDCS data, but the cited source is the wrong modality (fMRI vs EEG) and likely lacks the required tDCS intervention labels. This mismatch prevents the 'Primary Mode' from ever functioning as described, forcing a permanent fallback to synthetic data and invalidating the core hypothesis test.

The 'Neurofusion EEG Resting State' dataset is cited with a URL to 'events.csv' (https://huggingface.co/datasets/neurofusion/eeg-restingstate/...). An events file typically contains only trial markers/timestamps, not the raw or preprocessed EEG time-series data required for spectral power and connectivity extraction (PLV/wPLI). The plan requires EEG epochs to compute features; citing an events-only file as a primary data source for feature extraction is inappropriate and will cause the pipeline to fail at the ingestion step.
